creator: toshi@ruby.ocn.ne.jp
text:
Libreoffice Calc installed from pkg doesn't start with the message below.  The file libsclo.so exists.  The local build binary work without problem.

  Component cannot be loaded, possibly broken or incomplete installation.
  Full error message:

   loading component library
  <file:///usr/local/lib/libreoffice/program/../program/libsclo.so>
  failed.


Versions:

  $ pkg info |grep libreoffice
  libreoffice-4.3.7 Full integrated office productivity suite

  $ uname -a
  FreeBSD example.jp 10.1-RELEASE-p10 FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE-p10 #0: Wed May 13 06:54:13 UTC 2015
  root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC amd64
